use_cases: Displaying security threat statistics by category in analytics dashboards
Comparing categorical metrics across different attack types
Visualizing performance or usage data in horizontal format
Monitoring cybersecurity metrics with animated visual feedback
ai_summary: A horizontal bar chart component built with Reaviz for visualizing categorical data across metrics like security threat categories (Brute Force, Web Attack, Malware, Phishing). Features animated bars with custom icons and metric labels, using motion for scroll-triggered animations. Designed for analytics dashboards in SaaS, dev-tools, and fintech applications requiring data visualization.
